preConditions.sqlCheck: select count(*) from user_role where role_id = 7

changeSet.author: modernization
changeSet.rollback: -- Automated rollback: Data/schema changes must be manually reviewed if destructive.

changeSet.author: modernization
changeSet.sql: UPDATE user_account SET api_key = replace(CAST(gen_random_uuid() AS text), '-', ''), enable_api_key = true WHERE api_key IS NULL OR api_key = '';
changeSet.rollback: -- Automated rollback: Data/schema changes must be manually reviewed if destructive.

changeSet.author: modernization
changeSet.rollback: -- Automated rollback: Data/schema changes must be manually reviewed if destructive.

changeSet.author: modernization
changeSet.sql: UPDATE user_account SET api_key = lower(rawtohex(sys_guid())), enable_api_key = 1 WHERE api_key IS NULL;
changeSet.rollback: -- Automated rollback: Data/schema changes must be manually reviewed if destructive.
